messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: On it. 47 customer support tickets in 2 hours: 'discount not showing at checkout'. Checking recent changes.

messages.author: iris_nakamura
messages.text: There was a deploy 20 minutes ago. Checking diff.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Root cause: The cache invalidation webhook began silently failing 6 days ago after a service.... Rolling back.

messages.author: carol_kim
messages.text: Incident closed. Postmortem scheduled for tomorrow.
